zh.lifeSummary: 當Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia於從1042年1月7日到1043年1月6日出生時，她的父親Ælfgar Earl of Merica20歲，母親Unknown21歲。她與Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1086年8月5日在英國林可爾史爾斯伯丁，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾斯伯丁。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia于从1042年1月7日到1043年1月6日出生时，她的父亲Ælfgar Earl of Merica20岁，母亲Unknown21岁。她与Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1086年8月5日在英国林可爾史爾斯伯丁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾斯伯丁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Mercia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Alessandro, Arcangelo, Vito.
Italian (Sicily): feminine form Meccio, which is probably a nickname from Sicilian mecciu ‘curl’, ‘ringlet’.

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

en.lifeSummary: When Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia was born from 7 January 1042 to 6 January 1043, her father, Ælfgar Earl of Merica, was 20 and her mother, Unknown, was 21. She married Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 5 August 1086, in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England, and was buried in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia est née du 7 janvier 1042 au 6 janvier 1043, son père, Ælfgar Earl of Merica, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 5 août 1086, à Spalding, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Spalding, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia von 7. Januar 1042 bis 6. Januar 1043 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ælfgar Earl of Merica 20 und ihre Mutter Unknown 21. Sie hat Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 5. August 1086 in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Spalding, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia è nata il da 7 gennaio 1042 a 6 gennaio 1043, sua padre, Ælfgar Earl of Merica, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Unknown, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 5 agosto 1086, nel Spalding, Lincolnshire, England, e fu sepolta a Spalding, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ealdgyth Edith of Merciaがから1042年1月7日まで1043年1月6日に生まれた時，父Ælfgar Earl of Mericaは20歳，母Unknownは21歳であった。Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Walesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1086年8月5日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスプアルディングで死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアスプアルディングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia(이)가 1042년 1월 7일부터 1043년 1월 6일까지에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ælfgar Earl of Merica(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1086년 8월 5일 영국 링코실르 스팔딩에서 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 스팔딩에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1086, em Spalding, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Spalding, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ealdgyth Edith of Mercia родилась с 7 января 1042 по 6 января 1043, её отцу по имени Ælfgar Earl of Merica было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffydd ap Llewelyn King of Wales. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 5 августа 1086 г. в местности спалдинг, линколншир, Англия и была похоронена в местности спалдинг, линколншир, Англия.
